problem id: 5a0c141c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  01100111 -> 01111100
  11001111 -> 11101001
  00111000 -> 10000111
  00001000 -> 10000001
  11111100 -> 11011111
  01001010 -> 10101001
  00111011 -> 10110111
  01101111 -> 11111101
  01110111 -> 01111110

query: 10000100
predicted answer: 01010000
